issues.message: Form controls on /about (pitch-a-show), /archive (search), /live (venue booking) and /partner (sponsorship inquiry) are missing programmatic labels / accessible names.

Layout consistency scores dip on /inner-circle (48.7) and /live (50.6); the deterministic alignment checker flags row-bottom and horizontal-alignment mismatches, but visually the pages read as intentional editorial composition rather than broken layout.

Inner-circle perks lockup group scored low (26.3) because tile children vary; visually the tiles are consistent. Live event-card group scored 48.5 because event cards intentionally vary (members-only RSVP vs Buy Tickets vs Tickets-on-sale states) which is correct content modelling, not a defect.

repair_instructions: Add explicit <label> elements (or aria-label attributes) tied to every form input on about.html (pitch-a-show form), archive.html (transcript search), live.html (venue booking) and partner.html (sponsorship inquiry) so screen readers announce each field. Visible field labels are already present above each input — wire them up with for/id pairs.

deterministic_checks.page_presence_resolved: All 10 declared concept pages have concrete implementations. The two 'not found' entries (/channels/03-the-late-signal and /channels/03-the-late-signal/s2e07-the-quiet-hour) are route templates that are satisfied by channels/the-late-signal.html and episode.html respectively, both clearly rendered in the screenshots.
